headline: Codezela Technologies wins Best SEO Company
standfirst: Codezela Technologies is recognised in the Global Business Excellence Awards previous winners archive for Best SEO Company, with source-backed context prepared for readers reviewing the award record.

content.text: Codezela Technologies and the award record

Codezela Technologies is recorded by the Global Business Excellence Awards as the winner of Best SEO Company. This article gives the award record context for readers who are searching for Codezela Technologies, the exact award title, and the verified sources currently available for this winner profile.

Sources support Codezela as an IT and software services company with web, software, app, and digital marketing positioning. This row records the Best SEO Company title exactly as imported. The profile is intentionally written as an award record rather than an unsupported marketing biography, so claims about scale, leadership, service quality, or market position are limited to what the cited sources can support.
Why the Best SEO Company record matters

The Best SEO Company recognition places Codezela Technologies in the GBE previous winners archive for 2025. For a prospective customer, partner, journalist, or award researcher, the practical value of this page is a clean public record: who received the award, what the award was called, and which source trail was reviewed before publication.
Recipient profile reviewed against available source notes.

Source notes reviewed for this page include gbeaward.com, codezela.com, srilankabusiness.com, lk.linkedin.com. These references are used to confirm identity, business activity, programme identity, or award context. Where a source is a social profile, directory listing, booking platform, or press article rather than a recipient-owned website, the article keeps the claim narrow and avoids treating that source as proof of wider performance.
For the Best SEO Company page, that source trail anchors the story to the exact award record instead of a broad promotional profile.

Potential disclosure issue because Codezela sources say it helped execute GBE 2025; avoid independent-ranking language beyond the award title. This limitation matters because the site should not turn a winner listing into inflated SEO copy. It should help people discover the award record while keeping every visible claim defensible.
The Best SEO Company page therefore stays careful, useful, and defensible for readers checking the public record.

Codezela Technologies's winner page will continue to be updated when stronger official sources, rights-cleared media, recipient statements, or ceremony materials are available. Until then, this page prioritises clarity, the official award wording, and source-backed context over generic promotional language.
Future updates to the Best SEO Company page can add deeper recipient context when stronger evidence is available.
